---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, status: needs triage
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. -->

## 🎯 Problem Statement

<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. -->
<!-- e.g., "I'm always frustrated when..." -->

## 💡 Proposed Solution

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->

## 📋 Alternatives Considered

<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->

## 🎨 Examples

<!-- Provide examples of how this feature would be used. -->
<!-- Code snippets, API designs, or usage examples are welcome. -->

## 📚 Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here. -->
<!-- Links to similar features in other engines are helpful. -->

## 🏗️ Implementation Ideas

<!-- If you have ideas about how to implement this feature, share them here. -->
<!-- This is optional but very helpful! -->

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

What should be true for this feature to be considered complete?

- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## 📝 Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this feature hasn't been requested before
- [ ] I have provided a clear description of the feature
- [ ] I have explained the use case for this feature
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's goals and scope
